description_long: This curtain features a double-layered design with a sheer white inner layer and a dark, likely black, outer drape. The outer drapes are gathered and tied back with gold-colored tiebacks, creating an elegant, arched opening in the center. The curtain is suspended from a set of three parallel golden rods, which are supported by decorative end finials. The sheer inner layer has a subtle vertical stripe pattern, adding texture and light diffusion. The outer fabric appears to be solid and heavy, providing privacy and light blocking. The overall look is classic and sophisticated, suitable for a window in a residential or formal urban setting.
description: A double-layered curtain with sheer white inner fabric and dark outer drapes, tied back with gold accents and mounted on triple golden rods.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full curtain with dark outer drapes tied back and sheer white inner layer visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the curtain layers and the alignment of the three golden rods.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the sheer white inner layer and the vertical stripe pattern, with the rods visible above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curtain's profile and the gold tieback detail.
attribute_fabric_pattern: solid color outer with sheer striped inner
